lead.a: Hover any translated string in your running app, click, and rewrite it. The matching key in your
lead.b: is saved to disk — indentation preserved. Zero config, local-first, and completely inert in production.

video.title: Hover, edit, save — in under a minute.
video.intro: A quick tour of the live editor running against a real Angular app: arm the inspector, hover a translated string, rewrite it, and watch the matching key land on disk.

how.title: Four moves, from hover to disk.
how.intro: No round-trips through your editor, no key spelunking. The client and the dev-server plugin cooperate so an edit in the browser lands in the right file.

features.title: Built to disappear into your dev loop.
features.intro: The hard parts — finding the right key, writing the right file, never breaking your build — are handled. You just edit text.

architecture.title: A browser half and a Node half that meet at the dev server.

intro.a: One install, one builder swap, one provider. Then
intro.b: and start editing — the steps work the same in an Nx workspace or a plain Angular CLI app.
